## Summary
Project scaffolded for Reva Electronics with dark, futuristic frontend (React + TypeScript) and Node.js backend (TypeScript). Features and structure inspired by SilicOcean, but design is original. Color palette: Ocean (#016064), Peacock (#022D36).
